title: Temperance needs some work - Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: # Temperance needs some work - Smith Tower Visitor Experience. **#10** of 192 Sights & Landmarks in Seattle. *   Image 5 2 ### Seattle's Original Guided Harbor Cruise 4.7 (856) from $46. Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience. While the history of the Smith Tower is significant, unfortunately it help the issues plaguing Temperance. The lighting is harsh, it is cold and it lacks the intimacy you would expect for something billed as a special place. I hope that someone from the Smith tower contact me and I would be happy to discuss this with them as this is a missed opportunity. I am glad you enjoyed Temperance cafe and bar and I look forward to welcoming you back again soon. This is a fantastic building with a self guided tour and great views of the city from the bar and observation deck at the top. I am glad you enjoyed the Smith Tower Visitor Experience and I look forward to welcoming you back again soon.
